mapper.sql: id, name, description, category, retrieval_strategy, chunk_strategy, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separators_json, document_count, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM km_knowledge_base WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM km_knowledge_base WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM km_knowledge_base WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, retrieval_strategy = #{retrievalStrategy}, chunk_strategy = #{chunkStrategy}, chunk_size = #{chunkSize}, chunk_overlap = #{chunkOverlap}, separators_json = #{separatorsJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM km_document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'READY'
